name: example-quality-eval
description: Example quality eval scenarios. Replace with your skill-specific prompts and assertions.

evals.name: autonomous-onboarding-no-context
evals.prompt: I want to set up a wallet for my AI agent
evals.expected_behavior: Agent should identify autonomous mode and guide through 7-step setup

assertions.description: Runs <skill-cli> init or equivalent setup command
Provides expected output for each step

evals.name: autonomous-onboarding-defi-context

conversation_history.content: I'm building an AI agent for DeFi arbitrage
DeFi arbitrage requires fast execution and specific token approvals. What chains are you targeting?
Mainly Base and Arbitrum for now

evals.prompt: Now help me set up a wallet for this agent
evals.expected_behavior: Agent should recognize DeFi context and suggest appropriate policy constraints (spending limits, approved tokens, chain restrictions)

evals.name: supervised-with-token
evals.prompt: I have a token from my Portal: <setup-token>. Help me set up my agent wallet
evals.expected_behavior: Agent should recognize supervised mode (Mode A) and skip self-registration steps

assertions.description: Identifies supervised or Mode A path
Does NOT suggest <skill-cli> init (already has token)

evals.name: error-handling-network-failure
evals.prompt: Set up my agent wallet. Note: the network is currently unstable.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent should attempt setup and handle network errors gracefully with retry suggestions

evals.name: policy-configuration

conversation_history.content: I've set up my agent wallet
Great! Your wallet is ready. What would you like to do next?

evals.prompt: Configure a spending policy: max $100 per transaction, $500 daily limit, only USDC on Base
evals.expected_behavior: Agent should translate natural language to policy configuration commands

assertions.description: Runs policy create or update command

comparisons.name: context-sensitivity
comparisons.description: Compare DeFi context vs no context for onboarding
comparisons.judge_criteria: Does the agent appropriately tailor its guidance based on the DeFi context? Variant A should show more specific DeFi-related suggestions.
